goal: Implemented inventory.api.search_items by exposing reusable catalog filtering for API clients.
verification: Ran python -m pytest tests evaluation_tests in the project repository; 6 of 6 tests passed. Additional boundary checks for empty item lists, numeric-string price bounds, and invalid min_price/max_price values passed.
risks: The E_summary_only predecessor handoff was available only as an unstructured natural-language summary. It reported passing catalog tests but did not provide an exact predecessor commit or full command output, so verification relied on the checked-out baseline, visible requirements, and current repository tests.
